goal: Fix the remaining settings tab identifier inconsistency and visible settings text encoding issues between App.tsx and SettingsModal.tsx, while keeping the change tightly scoped.
constraints: Fix only the settings tab identifier mismatch, clearly malformed/mojibake user-facing settings text, and directly related literals.
Do not refactor unrelated logic or alter settings behavior beyond what is needed to normalize the affected strings.
Preserve consistent tab identity between App.tsx and SettingsModal.tsx.
Prefer ASCII-safe replacements like ae/oe/ue if there is any encoding risk.
Run a relevant local check if practical.
success_criteria: App.tsx and SettingsModal.tsx use consistent values for the affected settings tab names.
Visible malformed settings UI text in those files is corrected.
A relevant local check is reported.
